message.content:
@startuml
actor Admin
participant ":RemoveScooterUI" as UI #LightBlue2
participant ":RemoveScooterController\n:ScooterController" as Controller #LightGreen3
database "pharmDB :PharmacyDB" as PharmDb1 #Yellow4
control "scoopServ \n:ScooperService" as ScoopSrv1 #Orange5
boundary "scoutDB \n:ScouterDB" as ScoutDb1 #Pink6

Admin -> UI: 1 Sends a request regarding the update of an electric scooter's data
activate UI
UI->Controller: 2 showPharmacys() 
activate Controller
create participant pharmServ : PharmacyService#DarkSeaGreen
controller --> pharmserv: create ()
note right of controller:: pharmacy service created
destroy controller


@enduml
